stemHtml: An overtaking aircraft is one that approaches another from the rear on a line forming an angle of less than…

options.a: 70 degrees with the plane of symmetry of the other aircraft.
options.b: 50 degrees with the plane of symmetry of the other aircraft.
options.c: 80 degrees with the plane of symmetry of the other aircraft.
options.d: 60 degrees with the plane of symmetry of the other aircraft.
